name: Jared Thornton
blurb:
I'm Jared. I'm just another person who has an interest in way too many subjects. By day I do a lot of electrical engineering, automation, documentation, scripting and development, and workflow development. By night, I do self-hosting, graphic design, photography, videography, gaming, cars, legos, and just about anything and everything else. 

This site is just mean to serve as a place to house the ADD-addled mess that is my life. You'll find a healthy collection of all the different projects I've worked on throughout my life, from applications I've made to youtube channels I've had since i was young. Enjoy!
